infotexts.ShadowCulling.CullingEnabled.Tooltip: When enabled, game entities such as items, structures, and characters that are completely occluded by shadows will not be rendered, resulting in significant performance improvements in complex scenes. (Only takes effect when LOS is enabled.)
infotexts.ShadowCulling.CullingInterval.Tooltip: Higher values improve performance but may cause 'flickering' as entities are not culled in time. 0.05s is recommended.
infotexts.ShadowCulling.DebugDrawingEnabled.Toolti: Master toggle for all shadow culling debug visualizations. When disabled, none of the individual debug drawing options will be visible.
infotexts.ShadowCulling.DebugDrawingHull.Tooltip: Visualize the hulls used to check shadow occluder.
infotexts.ShadowCulling.DebugDrawingShadow.Tooltip: Visualize the shadow-casting geometry (light source direction lines) that drives the occlusion calculation.
infotexts.ShadowCulling.DebugDrawingItem.Tooltip: Show bounding boxes of items and their culling status (visible/culled). light indicates rendered; dim culled by shadow.
infotexts.ShadowCulling.DebugDrawingStructure.Tool: Show bounding boxes of structures and their culling status (visible/culled). light indicates rendered; dim culled by shadow.
infotexts.ShadowCulling.DebugDrawingCharacter.Tool: Show bounding boxes of characters (NPCs, creatures) and their culling status (visible/culled). light indicates rendered; dim culled by shadow.
